title: Create an orange cube button that disables after 5 taps (Flutter)

input.description:
# Task Metadata: task 7

## Task ID
task 7

## Action
Create an orange cube button that disables after 5 taps (Flutter)

## Stack
Flutter

## Skip Flags
- Skip Designer: True
- Skip Developer: False
- Skip Tester: False

## Max QA Retries
3 (default)

## Pipeline
Architect → Developer → Tester (Designer skipped)

## Summary
Create `test/orange_cube_button.dart` with `PurpleCubeButton` StatefulWidget. 80×80 orange square showing tap count as centered white text. After 5 taps: turns grey and ignores further taps.

## Key Files
- **Create**: `test/orange_cube_button.dart`
- **Reference**: `test/white_cube_button.dart` (task 6 — same pattern, threshold 4→5, color purple→orange)

artifacts.implementation_plan:
# Implementation Plan: Orange Cube Button Disables After 5 Taps

## Task
Create a Flutter `PurpleCubeButton` StatefulWidget in `test/orange_cube_button.dart`.

## Reference
- `test/purple_cube_button.dart` (task 5) / `test/white_cube_button.dart` (task 6) — same pattern, threshold 4→5, color purple→orange

## File to Create
`test/orange_cube_button.dart`

## Requirements
- Widget class: `PurpleCubeButton` (StatefulWidget) — per instructions
- File name: `test/orange_cube_button.dart`
- Dimension
